ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "class_year" INTEGER /* Class year of the student (1 for freshman, 4 for senior) */,
  "lark_owl" TEXT /* Sleep preference (Lark, Owl, Neither) */,
  "num_early_class" INTEGER /* Number of early morning classes */,
  "early_class" INTEGER /* Number of early classes attended */,
  "classes_missed" INTEGER /* Number of classes missed */,
  "cognition_zscore" REAL /* Cognition z-score */,
  "poor_sleep_quality" INTEGER /* Frequency of poor sleep quality */,
  "depression_score" INTEGER /* Depression score */,
  "anxiety_score" INTEGER /* Anxiety score */,
  "stress_score" INTEGER /* Stress score */,
  "depression_status" TEXT /* Depression status (normal, moderate, severe) */,
  "anxiety_status" TEXT /* Anxiety status (normal, moderate, severe) */,
  "stress_status" TEXT /* Stress status (normal, moderate, severe) */,
  "dass_score" INTEGER /* DASS (Depression, Anxiety, Stress) score */,
  "happiness" INTEGER /* Happiness score */,
  "alcohol_use" TEXT /* Alcohol use frequency (Light, Moderate, Heavy) */,
  "drinks" INTEGER /* Number of drinks per session */,
  "weekday_bed" REAL /* Average bedtime on weekdays */,
  "weekday-rise" REAL /* Average rise time on weekdays */,
  "weekday_sleep" REAL /* Average sleep duration on weekdays */,
  "weekend_bed" REAL /* Average bedtime on weekends */,
  "weekend-rise" REAL /* Average rise time on weekends */,
  "weekend_sleep" REAL /* Average sleep duration on weekends */,
  "average_sleep" REAL /* Average sleep duration overall */,
  "all_nighter" INTEGER /* Number of all-nighters per week */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student (if applicable) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's academic advisor */,
  "counselor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's primary counselor */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., counseling, academic advising) */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was conducted */,
  "intervention_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the intervention */,
  "counselor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counselor or advisor conducting the intervention */,
  "intervention_status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of any follow-up required */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes for the follow-up */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the intervention record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the intervention record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_counselor_id FOREIGN KEY ("counselor_id") REFERENCES counselors ("counselor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counselors" (
  "counselor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counselor or advisor */,
  "counselor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the counselor or advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the counselor or advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the counselor or advisor belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the counselor or advisor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the counselor's office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the counselor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the counselor record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counselor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the academic record */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Overall grade for the semester */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Honors received (e.g., Dean's List) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the academic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the academic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the health assessment */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure (e.g., 120/80) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate (beats per minute) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height in centimeters */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status (Yes, No) */,
  "alcohol_use_status" TEXT /* Alcohol use status (Yes, No) */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Exercise frequency (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the student */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the student */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications the student is taking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the health assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the health assessment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental health record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the mental health assessment */,
  "depression_score" INTEGER /* Depression score */,
  "anxiety_score" INTEGER /* Anxiety score */,
  "stress_score" INTEGER /* Stress score */,
  "depression_status" TEXT /* Depression status (normal, moderate, severe) */,
  "anxiety_status" TEXT /* Anxiety status (normal, moderate, severe) */,
  "stress_status" TEXT /* Stress status (normal, moderate, severe) */,
  "counselor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counselor or advisor conducting the assessment */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication prescribed for mental health issues */,
  "therapy_status" TEXT /* Status of any ongoing therapy (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mental health record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the mental health record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_records_counselor_id FOREIGN KEY ("counselor_id") REFERENCES counselors ("counselor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class schedule entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_time" TEXT /* Time of the class (e.g., 08:00-09:30) */,
  "class_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the class is held (e.g., MWF, TTh) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  "class_location" TEXT /* Location of the class */,
  "class_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the class */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the class schedule record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the class schedule record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
